creator: avg@icyb.net.ua
text:
A utility from coreboot (formerly linuxbios) project to read/write/etc
contents of flash rom chips. E.g. you can read or write a BIOS image
or some other kind of firmware.
More at:
http://www.coreboot.org/Flashrom

One note is that I am not sure what archs are really supported,
I used this tool on i386 and amd64.
